name: Yingdao MCP Server
what_it_does: MCP server from the ying-dao organization for the Yingdao platform — a Chinese data analytics and business intelligence service. Enables AI agents to query and interact with Yingdao data services, supporting data retrieval and analytics workflows for teams using the Yingdao platform.
use_cases: Querying Yingdao analytics data from reporting agents
Integrating Yingdao business intelligence into AI-driven data workflows
Accessing Yingdao data services from automation agents
Building AI-assisted analytics workflows on top of Yingdao platform
not_for: Teams not using the Yingdao platform
Non-Chinese market data analytics use cases
Teams requiring English-language documentation and support
best_when: A data team using the Yingdao platform wants AI agents to query and interact with their analytics data in automated workflows.
avoid_when: You don't use Yingdao. Platform is Chinese-market focused with CN data residency — review compliance requirements before adoption.

auth.notes: Yingdao API credentials required. Standard API key authentication for the Yingdao platform.

pricing.notes: MCP server is free open source. Yingdao platform subscription required for data access.

known_agent_gotchas: Documentation primarily in Chinese — review translated docs for non-Chinese teams
Data residency in CN — review regulatory compliance before adoption
Platform-specific tool — only useful for existing Yingdao customers
Community-level quality from ying-dao org — may evolve without notice
agent_readiness.security_notes: CN data residency. HTTPS to Yingdao APIs. API key credentials required. Review data sovereignty requirements.

security_score_components.security_notes: CN data residency. API key auth. HTTPS. Review compliance for non-CN teams.
